calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James O'Neil, via ZOOM, for Ana Siu, via ZOOM, Administrator.

The court begins by asking counsel regarding his plans to address the current issues with this matter. Counsel reports that he submitted a declaration for e-filing that accounts for four (4) of the five (5) issues raised by the Examiner's notes. Counsel advises that he currently is unable to provide information regarding the 5th issue as he is waiting for a reply from one of the decedent's daughters. Counsel also reports that an amended petition may be filed. Regarding not appearing at the previous calling of this matter, counsel reports that it had been mis calendared due to a computer issue.

The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to September 13, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Conservator Ana Siu and the Attorney James O'Neil to appear on July 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Court is also issuing an order to show cause as to why the Administrator should not be suspended (same date and time). The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Etate
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil, Esq., counsel for Ana Sui, Administrator (appearing separately by video conference).

The Court notes at the outset that no Petition for Final Distribution has been filed. Mr. O'Neil reports on the status of the estate, that the Inventory and Appraisal is now complete and has been sent to the Probate Referee, and that the Petition for Final Distribution can be filed shortly after receipt of the Inventory and Appraisal from the referee.

The Court sets hearing on the status of the filing of the Petition for Final Distribution for November 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If the Petition is on file prior to that date, no appearance will be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (D204)
